Name: Prune
Text: Scrap a Diamond or Heart. (Move it from your discard to the scrap pile.)

Name: Sculpt
Text: Scrap a Heart or Spade. (Move it from your discard to the scrap pile.)

Name: Extract
Text: Scrap a Spade or Club. (Move it from your discard to the scrap pile.)

Name: Trim
Text: Scrap a Club or Diamond. (Move it from your discard to the scrap pile.)

Name: Defer
Text: Look at the top card of your deck. You may put it on the bottom.

Name: Loot
Text: Draw a card, then discard a card.

Name: Rummage
Text: Target player Refreshes. (Discards a card, then draws a card.)

Name: Consider
Text: Look at the top card of your deck. You may discard it.

Name: Entomb
Text: Search your deck for a card, put it into your discard, then shuffle.

Name: Gamble
Text: Search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. If you do, discard a card at random, then shuffle.

Name: Cultivate
Text: Search your deck for a card, then shuffle and put that card on top.

Name: Unearth
Text: Return target card from your discard to your hand. If you do, discard a card.

Name: Mill
Text: Put the top three cards of your deck into your discard.

Name: Forecast
Text: At the end of the score phase, put a card from your scoring hand on top of your deck.

Name: Recall
Text: Return another target Action card you control from play to your hand, then discard a card.

Name: Reclaim
Text: Put target card from your discard on top of your deck.

Name: Curse
Text: Move target card from the scrap pile into target opponent's discard.

Name: Abduct
Text: Move target Action card from play into your discard, then scrap this card.

Name: Exchange
Text: Exchange target card in an opponent's discard with target card in your discard.

Name: Banish
Text: Move target card from an opponent's discard to the scrap pile.

Name: Freeze
Text: Target opponent can't scrap cards this round.

Name: Negate
Text: Target opponent can't play Modify Actions this round.

Name: Abdicate
Text: Target opponent reveals a hand with no face cards or discards a face card, then draws a card.

Name: Nullify
Text: Put target Modify card from play into its owner's discard.

Name: Capitulate
Text: If you have the worst hand this round, you may scrap a card.

Name: Vanish
Text: At the end of the score phase, scrap a card that shares a suit with a card from your scoring hand.

Name: Reject
Text: Look at the top card of your deck. You may put it in the scrap pile.

Name: Capitalize
Text: When you discard this card from your hand, you may scrap a card.

Name: Terminate
Text: Scrap a non-face card. (Move it from your discard to the scrap pile.)

Name: Impeach
Text: Scrap a face card. (Move it from your discard to the scrap pile.)

Name: Accumulate
Text: Scrap a card that shares a suit or rank with a scrapped card.

Name: Reap
Text: Scrap a card that shares a suit or rank with another card in your discard.

Name: Nudge
Text: Change the rank of a card in your scoring hand by one.

Name: Disguise
Text: Change the suit of a card in your scoring hand to any suit.

Name: Buff
Text: Change the rank of a card in your scoring hand to any higher rank.

Name: Nerf
Text: Change the rank of a card in your scoring hand to any lower rank.

Name: Clone
Text: One card in your scoring hand is a copy of another target card in your scoring hand.

Name: Duplicate
Text: This card enters play as a copy of another target Action you control in play.

Name: Reflect
Text: This card enters play as a copy of target Action an opponent controls in play.

Name: Reminisce
Text: One card in your scoring hand is a copy of target card in your discard.

Name: Miscalculate
Text: As long as this card is scrapped, players may change the rank of unmodified 2s in their scoring hand to any rank.

Name: Camouflage
Text: As long as this card is scrapped, players may change the suit of unmodified 2s in their scoring hand to any suit.

Name: Sift
Text: As long as this card is scrapped, whenever a player would Refresh, they may instead draw a card, then discard a card.

Name: Declutter
Text: As long as this card is scrapped, whenever a player would Refresh, they may instead scrap a card.

Name: Brainstorm
Text: Draw three cards, then put three cards from your hand on top of your deck in any order.

Name: Improvise
Text: Put the top three cards of your deck into your discard. Return target card from your discard to your hand, then discard a card.

Name: Rejuvenate
Text: Discard up to three cards, then draw that many cards.

Name: Bury
Text: Scrap up to three cards. (Move them from your discard to the scrap pile.)

Name: Salvage
Text: Put target card from the scrap pile into your hand. If you do, play an additional Action this round.

Name: Explore
Text: Draw a card. If you do, play an additional Action this round.

Name: Retrieve
Text: Return another target Action card you control from play to your hand. If you do, play an additional Action this round.

Name: Reanimate
Text: Return target card from your discard to your hand. If you do, play an additional Action this round.
